// talentData.js — Mock student talent profiles for employer page

  {

    skills: ["Figma", "UX Research", "Prototyping"],
  },
  {
    id: "ss4",
    name: "Devraj Patel",
    initials: "DP",

    role: "Backend Intern → SDE-1",
    company: "CloudMesh",
    companyLogo: "CM",
    companyColor: "#67E8F9",
    college: "DAIICT Gandhinagar",
    domain: "Engineering",
    tagColor: "cyan",

    companyLogo: "DS",
    companyColor: "#FCD34D",

    domain: "Marketing",

    timeToOffer: "4 weeks",
    year: "2023",
    skills: ["SEO", "Meta Ads", "Analytics"],
  },
  {
    id: "ss6",
    name: "Aryan Thakur",
    initials: "AT",
    avatarColor: "#A5B4FC",
